def test_alias_configured():
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["jj", "config", "list", "aliases.mylog"],
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            env={**os.environ, "HOME": "/home/user"}
        )
        assert result.returncode == 0, "Failed to list jj config for aliases.mylog."

def test_run_alias():

            ["jj", "mylog"],
            cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            env={**os.environ, "HOME": "/home/user"}
